KraneShares Launches First Global Humanoid & Embodied Intelligence ETF (Ticker: KOID) On Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: KOID is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Credo Technology Group Holding stock at 3.99%, STMicroelectronics at 3.49%, Harmonic Drive Systems at 3.16%, Infineon Technologies AG at 3.10%, and Leader Harmonious Drive Systems at 3.08%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Global Humanoid Robotics and Physical AI Index ETF (KOID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of companies from around the world that are engaged in humanoid and embodied intelligence. The fund selects securities using a model focused on key categories to capture the thematic exposure. KOID was launched on Jun 4, 2025 and is issued by KraneShares.
